message:
feat(prechecks): add systemd supervisor detection with actionable recommendations (6l1.1)

- Add SupervisorInfo and SupervisorAction types for rich supervisor metadata
- Enhance check_supervisor to use collect_systemd_unit for full systemd unit info
- Include recommended actions (restart/stop commands) in block reasons
- Add get_supervisor_info method to PreCheckProvider trait
- Add unit tests for supervisor action formatting and block reasons
- Fix type mismatch in session.rs tmux/screen detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
